notice: Curated demonstration graph only. These seed relationships are source-linked examples for an end-to-end project demonstration and must not be treated as a systematic literature synthesis.

papers.title: Physiological response of diverse halophytes to high salinity
papers.abstract: Demonstration metadata. Review the linked PubMed record before using this claim in a formal result. The study discusses compartmentalization of toxic ions as a salt-tolerance strategy across diverse halophytes.

papers.title: Combined genome and transcriptome provides insight into salt tolerance of Suaeda salsa
papers.abstract: Demonstration metadata. The linked PubMed record reports amplification of HKT1, NHX, SOS and CASP-related gene families associated with salt resistance in Suaeda salsa.
